title: Settings

profile.title: Your personal details
profile.description: Keep your name, birth date and address up to date.

preferences.title: Make Alveryn yours
preferences.description: Choose your language, formats, theme and daily work defaults.

employment.title: Your employment period
employment.description: Set your contract type and when your employment starts or ends.

absences.title: Your absence rules
absences.description: Define vacation, sick leave and other absences, including paid hours.

hourlyRates.title: Rates that follow your history
hourlyRates.description: Add dated hourly rates so every workday uses the correct value.

hourlyRateEditor.title: Add a rate period
hourlyRateEditor.description: Enter the hourly amount, currency and the dates when it applies.

workTypes.title: Build your own work setup
workTypes.description: Start empty and add only the activities and calculations you actually use.

about.title: About this app
about.description: See the installed Alveryn version and product information.

help.title: Need help?
help.description: Contact support directly when something is unclear or does not work.

workSetup.title: Work setup
workSetup.description: Configure the activities that can be added to a job. A job can contain several work lines, and every line keeps its own formula.
workSetup.emptyDescription: Create the first formula you use at work: hours, units converted to hours, or direct per-unit pay.

workTypeEditor.chooseModeDescription: Start with the formula. The next step only shows the fields needed for that type of work.
workTypeEditor.editorDescription: Choose how this work is counted.
workTypeEditor.deactivateDescription: Historical work records stay intact. This work type simply becomes unavailable for new records.
workTypeEditor.deleteDescription: This work type has no saved work records, so it can be removed completely.
workTypeEditor.savedEntriesError: This work type already has saved work records. Create a new work type instead.

fields.name: Name
fields.teamworkDescription: Ask for team size and divide direct per-unit pay by the number of workers.
fields.compositeDescription: This work type can contain several internal formulas.

validation.fixErrors: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

compensation.hourlyDescription: Quantities become equivalent time and use your hourly rate.
compensation.perUnitDescription: Each unit has its own rate, for example EUR per m².

info.timeDescription: For shifts or tasks measured in hours.
info.timeConfigureValue: A name and the usual break time.
info.timeResultValue: Worked time and estimated earnings from your hourly rate.
info.unitsPerHourDescription: For work measured by completed quantity and pace.
info.unitsPerHourConfigureValue: Unit name, symbol and how many units equal one hour.
info.unitsPerHourResultValue: Completed quantity, equivalent hours and estimated earnings.
info.perUnitDescription: For work paid directly by the completed quantity.
info.perUnitConfigureValue: Unit name, symbol, price per unit and currency.
info.perUnitResultValue: Completed quantity and the calculated amount.
info.fixedDescription: For tasks with a price that can change from job to job.
info.fixedConfigureValue: Only a name. You enter the amount when recording the work.
info.fixedResultValue: The exact amount saved for that task.

modes.timeDescription: Use this when the activity is paid or tracked by actual start and end time.
modes.unitsPerHourDescription: Use this when completed units become equivalent time, then use the hourly rate.
modes.perUnitDescription: Use this for m², deliveries, rooms, tasks or any unit paid directly.
modes.fixedDescription: Use this when each recorded task has its own fixed amount.

workTypeFormulas.sectionDescription: These are the activities that appear inside a New Job. Add one line for every thing you may complete during a workday.
workTypeFormulas.emptyDescription: Add the first line that should appear when creating a job.

modes.timeDescription: For checks, service work, shifts or any activity measured by time.
modes.unitsPerHourDescription: For work where quantity becomes equivalent time.
modes.perUnitDescription: For m², deliveries, rooms, orders, tasks or any paid unit.
modes.fixedDescription: For services or tasks where you enter the agreed amount when saving the job.

validation.unitsPerHour: Units per hour must be greater than zero
validation.ratePerUnit: Rate per unit must be greater than zero
validation.fixErrors: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

profileEditor.title: Profile
profileEditor.description: Keep the essentials accurate. Advanced fields stay calm and out of the way.

password.minimumLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters

menuDescriptions.email: Email change will be available here.
menuDescriptions.phone: Phone number change will be available here.
menuDescriptions.password: Password change will be available here.
menuDescriptions.security: Sign-in and security settings will live here.
menuDescriptions.payment: Payment and shipping details will live here.

addresses.title: Saved addresses
addresses.description: Create reusable addresses and select them for your profile or jobs.

validation.employmentEndBeforeStart: Employment end cannot be before employment start

hourlyRateEditor.description: Saved work record amounts stay unchanged even when a rate period is updated or removed.
hourlyRateEditor.deleteDescription: This removes the rate period, but saved work record amounts remain unchanged.

validation.hourlyRate: Hourly rate must be zero or positive
validation.validToBeforeFrom: End date cannot be before start date

discardDescription: Your unsaved edits will be lost.
